path.style: vector-effect: non-scaling-stroke; fill: rgb(131, 201, 255); fill-opacity: 1; stroke: rgb(68, 68, 68); stroke-opacity: 1; stroke-width: 0px; opacity: 1;

text.style: font-family: "Source Sans", sans-serif; font-size: 12px; fill: rgb(68, 68, 68); fill-opacity: 1; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; white-space: pre;
